entity.label: Dimnah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Dunghill, a city of Zebulun given to the Merarite Levites (Josh. 21:35). In 1 Chr. 6:77 the name “Rimmon” is substituted.

nodes.label: Dimnah
nodes.description: Dunghill, a city of Zebulun given to the Merarite Levites (Josh. 21:35). In 1 Chr. 6:77 the name “Rimmon” is substituted.

verses.text: Dimnah with her suburbs, Nahalal with her suburbs; four cities.
